message:
To: Tech
From: Fives

Status update on frontend/server relay UI pass.

Completed artifacts produced in chat:
- rigsr_auto_clear.html
- server_auto_clear.py

Implemented scope from relay 00032026136002:
- Added User / 99 as visible mailbox participant.
- Expanded mailbox polling to 99 and 00-06.
- Added inbox viewer for relay/index/<id>.json pending files.
- Added relay open/display behavior for relay/inbox/<filename>.
- Added structured relay creation form.
- Kept legacy text relay parser as helper behavior only.
- Added server endpoint POST /relay/submit.
- Added server-generated relay_id using locked naming pattern.
- Preserved session logging and END SESSION behavior.
- Did not modify n8n workflow, relay rules, registry files, archive lifecycle, Saul archival behavior, or relay status promotion.

Follow-up fixes after user testing:
- Moved relay creation UI into a slide-out drawer from the agent list.
- Prepopulates relay target based on selected agent.
- Added CREATE RELAY button/label styled like the rest of UI.
- Locked normal chat send for CGPT/manual agents Tech, Fives, and Hiero.
- Added mailbox index clearing after opening pending relays, replacing manual-only mark read behavior.
- Added fallback CLEAR beside pending relay items.
- Added tolerant server handling for agent/agent_id/to and filename/relay_file/relay_filename.
- Corrected local relay repo path handling for nested path: RIGSR/RIGSR_Archive/rigsr-relay.

Current state:
- Latest recommended pair is rigsr_auto_clear.html + server_auto_clear.py.
- User requested this status relay after the latest auto-clear patch.
- Live validation is not confirmed yet after replacing files and restarting local server.

Known unresolved / watch items:
- Need user-side live test confirming pending mail badge clears automatically after opening a relay.
- Need user-side live test confirming structured relay submit creates file and updates recipient index successfully.
- Need user-side confirmation that CGPT/manual chat lock behavior is acceptable in daily use.

No source-of-truth promotion requested or performed.
